vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk ¼Iyktkvksa½ dk voLFkku ¼pSusta½ ckbikl dh yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ ftlds fy, vfrfjDr 'kqYd lans; gS yEckbZ ykxr fd-eh-@pSust 194-000 ¼iVuk 36-400 fd-eh- ¼195-000 fd- 330-00 djksM+ -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] nhnkjxat xkao ds ikl½ 400 fd-eh-½ ftys esa nhnkjxat xkao ds ikl½ eh- ls 231-400 fd-eh- rd½ #i, [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@628@11&12@lhvks@thlh iVuk ¼181-30&231-95½ chvksVh] vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st July, 2015 S.O. 1786(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by Section 7 of the National Highway Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number S.O. 1081 (E), dated the 30.04.2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:— [F. No. NHAI/13013/628/11-12/CO/GC Patna (181.30—231.95) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. S. No. For Read As Para 3 on Page 3 (8th line) …and at the base rates mentioned in Table 2 for the realignment of 36.4 Km length from Km 195.000 to Km 231.400 on the Type of Vehicle specified in Table 1 &2 below, and … …and at the base rates mentioned in Table 2 for the use of net bypass length of 36.4 Km from Km 195.000 to Km 231.400 costing fifty crore rupees or more on the Type of Vehicle specified in Table 1 &2 below, and … Para 2 below Table 2 In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bypass(es) at the following Toll Plaza(s) at one and half times of the base rate for the length of bypass(es) specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s) (chainage) Length & Names of bypass (in km) for which additional fee is payable Length Cost Km/Ch. 194.000 (near Deedarganj village in Patna district) 36.400 Km (Km 195.000 to Km 231.400) 330.00 In addition to above, the fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bypass at the following toll plaza in accordance with base rates specified in Table-2 above. Location of Toll Plaza(s) (chainage) Length of bypass (in km) for which additional fee is payable Length Cost Km/Ch. 194.000 (near Deedarganj village in Patna district) 36.400 Km (Km 195.000 to Km 231.400) Rs. 330.00 Crore -- 2 of 2 --
